command: docker_compose_up host=192.168.1.100 user=admin path=/opt/webapp port=2222 key_path=/Users/admin/.ssh/deploy_key
description: Start webapp with custom SSH settings

command: docker_compose_logs host=192.168.1.100 user=admin path=/opt/webapp service=api tail=100 follow=true
docker_compose_exec host=192.168.1.100 user=admin path=/opt/webapp service=db command="mysql -u root -p -e 'SHOW DATABASES;'"
